summary: Full E2E testing of DebtWise (debt management app). Backend: 24/24 pytest passing (auth register/login/me/logout, Emergent /auth/session 401 on invalid, brute-force lockout after 5 attempts, debts CRUD with user-scoping, strategies calculate for all 4 strategies + compare, reminders sorted). Frontend: landing, signup, signin, protected route redirect, add/edit/delete debts, dashboard with all 4 metrics + breakdown + timeline + strategy compare + reminders, strategies page with slider triggering recalc, simulator toggle, logout all working.

minor.issue: allow_origins is set from FRONTEND_URL env (f5d3ada9-... preview), but actual frontend is served at payoff-planner-26.preview.emergentagent.com. CORS still works because ingress/Cloudflare returns access-control-allow-origin:* on OPTIONS, but for credentialed cross-origin browser requests the server's own CORS middleware would NOT allow this origin. Tests passed because the ingress is rewriting CORS headers. Recommend syncing FRONTEND_URL to the actual frontend domain or using a wildcard list.

issues: React console warning: 'Cannot update a component (Strategies) while rendering a different component (Slider)'. setState is being called during render inside the Slider component. Functional behavior still works (slider commit triggers recalc) but should be fixed by moving the state update out of render (e.g., wrap in useEffect or only fire on onValueCommit/onValueChange handlers).

action_items: (Low) Fix React setState-in-render warning in /app/frontend/src/pages/Strategies.jsx around the Slider component.

(Low) Align backend FRONTEND_URL in /app/backend/.env with the actual preview domain (payoff-planner-26.preview.emergentagent.com) for correct CORS allowlisting at the FastAPI layer; current ingress override masks this.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py simulate_strategy() correctly applies interest, minimum payments, and snowball roll-over of freed minimums; per-debt payoff_month captured properly.
Brute-force lockout uses identifier=ip:email and locks for 15 minutes after 5 failed attempts; resets on success. Good.
All endpoints exclude MongoDB _id via projection {_id: 0}.
JWT cookies set with httponly=True, secure=True, samesite=none (correct for cross-site preview env).
/api/auth/session calls Emergent demobackend; gracefully returns 401 on invalid session_id (tested).
Custom strategy requires custom_order list; falls back to active order if missing — acceptable.
Strategy schedule capped at 600 months (50yr) — sensible.
Debts are user-scoped at query level (user_id filter on update/delete) — verified isolation between users.
Email validator rejects reserved TLDs like .test (use real domains for test fixtures).
test_credentials: Admin: admin@debtwise.app / Admin@123 (in /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test users created during tests use test_<uuid>@example.com / Passw0rd!
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates throwaway test_<uuid>@example.com users + TEST_-prefixed debts (cleaned up in seeded_debts fixture teardown). Frontend tests created 2 test users and a few debts (left in DB but isolated to those users).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_debtwise_api.py runs in ~8s. Use BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Note: pydantic EmailStr rejects .test/.localhost TLDs — use @example.com. Frontend debt dialog testids are debt-name, debt-balance, debt-apr, debt-min (NOT debt-min-payment), debt-due (NOT debt-due-day). Delete uses window.confirm — register page.on('dialog', d.accept) before clicking delete-debt-{id}. Strategies slider uses onValueCommit so wait ~2s after slider interaction for recalc.
rca of the issue: N/A — all features functional. Minor React setState-in-render warning in Strategies page from Slider's onValueChange or derived render; functional impact is none but should be cleaned up.
